critic_raw:
## ML Critique (Run 3): SaaS Churn Prediction

**Issue 1 — Stratified random split over 36-month data allows future-to-past leakage**

Random 70/15/15 split means future observations can appear in training and past observations in test. Churn prediction requires chronological split to reflect deployment conditions (predict future churn from current state).

**Issue 2 — Preprocessing fit at 'dataset construction time' before split = test data included in scaling statistics**

If scaling parameters use all 36 months, test-set statistics inform training-set feature representations. This is preprocessing leakage requiring correction.
